mapper.insert: insert into notice_record(id, sender_user_id, recipient_user_id, topic, content, status, create_time) values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{senderUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{recipientUserId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{topic}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, sender_user_id as senderUserId, recipient_user_id as recipientUserId, topic, content, status, create_time as createTime from notice_record where status != 2 and recipient_user_id = #{userId} and topic = #{topic} order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
